/Credit Cards/Credit Cards by Metrobank

Credit Cards by Metrobank

Updated: Jun 22, 2026

Metrobank credit cards make it easy to manage your finances while enjoying meaningful rewards. From cashback on essentials to perks for shopping, dining, or traveling, each card is designed to help you get the most from your everyday transactions. With options that suit different lifestyles, you can pick a card that complements how you live, whether you’re a frequent traveler, a busy professional, or someone who loves convenience. Applying is straightforward and hassle-free, so you can start enjoying the benefits of your Metrobank credit card without delay.
Metrobank credit cards make it easy to manage your finances while enjoying meaningful rewards. From cashback on essentials to perks for shopping, dining, or traveling, each card is designed to help you get the most from your everyday transactions. With options that suit different lifestyles, you can pick a card that complements how you live, whether you’re a frequent traveler, a busy professional, or someone who loves convenience. Applying is straightforward and hassle-free, so you can start enjoying the benefits of your Metrobank credit card without delay.

Why Trust Moneymax?

Managing personal finance is more than comparing rates; it’s about making confident decisions with a trusted platform.

  • Part of MoneyHero Group (NASDAQ: MNY), Asia’s leading personal finance platform.

  • Registered with the SEC under Moneyguru Philippines Corporation.

  • Licensed by the Insurance Commission as a financial and insurance broker.

Don’t miss out on this great deal!

✨ Pick Your Perfect Metrobank Perk ✨

For a limited time only, apply for the Metrobank Titanium Mastercard, Metrobank Platinum Mastercard and Metrobank World Mastercard via Moneymax and get Welcome Gift when you activate your card and meet the minimum spend!

How to Qualify?

  • Campaign Period: June 1, 2026 to August 31, 2026.

  • How to Get Your Gift:

    • Apply and get approved for a Metrobank Credit Cards.

    • Choose your welcome gift: Select one (1) of the following rewards:
      -Lacoste Ossian Leather Card Holder
      -Tefal Garment Steamer
      -Samsung Galaxy Watch Fit 3
      -PHP 3,000 e-Gift Cash.

  • Reward Fulfilment:

    • Physical Gifts: Delivered within 12-15 weeks after confirmation.

    • e-Gift Cash: Emailed within 10-14 business days after approval.

  • Fastest Reward Fulfilment: Receive your e-Gift Cash in as little as 10 business days!

  • Terms and Conditions apply.

Apply by Aug 31, 2026 to claim your reward

Moneymax's take

  • Get up to 5% rebate on groceries, telecom, school & bookstore spend.
  • Enjoy exclusive features and offers from Metrobank
  • Enjoy exclusive credit card features from Metrobank
  • Ideal for practical spenders who prioritize everyday essentials and long term financial goals
  • No annual fee
  • Dining points
  • Free reward points
  • To unlock the 5% rebate, a minimum monthly spend of ₱12,000 on other categories is required; otherwise, a 0.2% rebate will apply.

Moneymax's take

  • Earn 2x Rewards Points (₱10 = 1 Rewards Point) on all online, electronics, gadgets, and mobile & internet purchases.
  • Earn 1 Rewards Point for every ₱20 spent on all other purchases.
  • Enjoy exclusive features and offers from Metrobank.
  • Ideal for career-driven individuals who want to get rewarded for their spend.
  • No annual fee
  • Dining points
  • Free reward points

The information you read may be different from what you see when you visit a partner, provider, or financial institution’s website.
